raw_action_dict.reasoning: Car is back on track but heading -74.6° while target waypoint 97 bears ~-117.7°, giving delta -43.1° — need to steer right to follow the track curving downward (south).
knowledge: Car recovered to track near x=0.99, y=3.10 after extended off-track left grass episode
Track curves sharply south/downward near waypoints 91-100 (x decreasing, y decreasing)
Heading must swing from -74° toward -120° or more to follow track south
Negative delta means steer right (negative steering_angle)
At delta ~43°, use speed=1.0-1.5 and steering=-20°
Track width 0.76m — narrow, stay centered while turning
is_left_of_center=true — car is slightly left, track curves right so this is acceptable
After sharp right turn, waypoints continue south then loop back east
Avoid overcorrecting — once delta < 15°, reduce steering to -5°
